steps.title: Read the requested cell
steps.content: The question asks for one table value: petri dish 6 in the chamber with venom-treated bacteria. The task is to use the row for dish 6 and the venom-treatment column.

steps.title: Reject wrong chamber values
steps.content: B is the saline-treated count for petri dish 6, so it is the wrong chamber. C and D are not the venom-treated value for dish 6. The venom-treated count for dish 6 is 153 CFUs. The answer is A.
